experimental.note: Method: flag any sector crossing out of a strong quad (Leading->Peaking / Improving->Weakening) with negative acceleration on a fresh bar, then event-study forward 5/10-day sector return conditioned on whether the next scheduled catalyst confirms or denies the roll. THIS RUN the detector flags an XLV->XLE hand-off on the fresh 2026-07-20 sector bar: XLV Weakening (quad W, accel -2.56, rsMom6m -5.32, rsMom 99.04) rolling out while XLE Leading (quad L, accel +2.43, rsMom 102.8, rsMom6m +13.43) rotates in, with leader XLK only Basing (quad A, accel +0.21, rsMom1m -5.02) and no clean Leading GICS sector - a DEFENSIVE(healthcare)->CYCLICAL(energy) hand-off (a risk-on roll), but XLE MA stack is still tangled (+12.54% >200d), so it is actionable as a tilt yet flagged for persistence per anti-whipsaw. experimental.title: Cross-tool haven-abstinence x sector-rotation risk-on gate (FIRES this run - defensive-out leg satisfied)
experimental.note: Method: on each fresh bar, cross the real-assets monetary-haven leg against the sector-RRG rotation vector - declare a 'clean risk-on' state only when (a) the monetary metals are in downtrends AND (b) a defensive sector is rotating out while a cyclical rotates in with no clean Leading defensive; then event-study forward bench drift conditioned on the joint state vs either half alone. THIS RUN the state fires on the honest read: the metal-haven leg is satisfied - GLD 11.2 and SLV 0 both Downtrend (mom63 -16.29 / -28.72), IBIT 22.9 Downtrend, BTC-USD 43.2 Mixed but medium-term soft (mom63 -16.45) so there is no haven bid - AND the sector roll is defensive-to-cyclical (XLV healthcare rotating OUT, rrgState Weakening, accel -2.56 -> XLE energy rotating IN, rrgState Leading, accel +2.43) with no clean Leading defensive, so leg (b) is met. Distinguishes a broad defensive-to-cyclical risk-on turn (this run) from an intra-cyclical reshuffle where leg (b) would be unmet. Inputs: real-assets GLD/SLV/IBIT/BTC-USD trend+mom63, sector per-name rrgState/rotation/accel with GICS defensive/cyclical tag, bench MA-stack; needs a persisted prior-bar snapshot to compute the state-transition delta across distinct market-bar dates.
